details: The agent ran comprehensive kubectl commands against the cluster and correctly identified all 11 fault namespaces with accurate root-cause categories: fault-configmap (missing ConfigMap), fault-crashloop (DB connection failure), fault-endpoints (service selector mismatch - app=web-backend-v2 vs app=web-backend), fault-imagepull (invalid image tag), fault-init (init container migration lock failure), fault-multicontainer (sidecar DNS resolution failure), fault-oom (OOMKilled exit code 137), fault-pvc (missing StorageClass 'fast-ssd'), fault-readiness (readiness probe on wrong port 8080 vs 80), fault-rollout (ProgressDeadlineExceeded with invalid image), fault-unschedulable (nodeSelector disktype:ssd-nvme-gen5 not matching any node). The healthy namespace was correctly not flagged. All diagnoses are supported by actual command output evidence.
